display.purpose: Hero headlines only, tight and confident.

headline.purpose: Major section titles and conversion blocks.

body.purpose: BM-first explanatory copy with 65-75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Short uppercase section labels, not decorative repetition.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small interaction transitions.

components.name: Primary Acquisition Button
components.description: Use for Daftar, Daftar Sekarang, and high-intent owner actions.

components.name: Marketing Card
components.description: Use for concise problem or step content. Avoid repeated identical grids when a flow visual is better.
components.html:
✓

Bayar Dahulu

Order diproses selepas bayaran untuk kurangkan risiko kerja sia-sia.

components.name: Lead Form Field
components.description: Use for owner lead capture and admin forms.

narrative.overview: CetakNow should feel like a clean, reliable print-shop counter where every file, payment, and pickup slot has a clear place. The visual system is local, trustworthy, and efficient.

rules.name: The Yellow Means Action Rule
rules.body: Yellow is reserved for conversion, selection, and progress signals.

rules.name: The Owner Reads Fast Rule
rules.body: Use short BM-first sentences. Rewrite startup jargon into shop-owner language.

rules.name: The Counter Surface Rule
rules.body: Surfaces lift just enough to separate from the counter. No dramatic glass or neon glow.

dos: Do keep Daftar and Daftar Sekarang dominant.
Do use navy for trust and yellow for action.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS template visuals.
Don't make English-first copy the default.
Don't let Log Masuk compete with Daftar or Daftar Sekarang.
